title: Recall Potion
description: Teleport to saved locations in a simple and balanced way. Inspired by Terraria and Dofus.
body:
About

This mod is inspired by Terraria's and Dofus' Recall Potions. Specific blocks like Campfires, Beds and others now act as saving points, which you can travel back to using 3 potions added by the mod:

 Recall Potion: Travel back to your latest saving point in the Overworld (World Spawn by default).
 Nether Potion: Travel to the Nether. You must have already visited the Nether and saved your location there.
 End Potion: Travel to the End. You must have already visited the End and saved your location there.

Features

  • You can save your location in each dimension by Sneak+Right-Click on any valid block (full list below).
  • Use one of the 3 potions to travel back to your latest saving point in the corresponding dimension.
  • Recall Potions can be found in any vanilla loot chest, or crafted using resources from their respective dimensions.
  • Unlike vanilla potions, these stack up to 16 and don't take much inventory space. Ideal for exploring sessions!

Saving points

Saving points are dimension-specific. You can save your location for the current dimension using one of the valid blocks from the list below:

  • Overworld: Bed, Campfire, Lodestone
  • Nether: Soul Campfire, Respawn Anchor, Lodestone
  • End: Lodestone

Want to get back to your base after some exploring? Just drink a Recall Potion and travel back home instantly!

Recipes

Tools for modpacks

More blocks can be added as valid saving points to each dimension, using block tags:

• Overworld: recall_save_point
• Nether: nether_save_point
• End: end_save_point

Structure is as follows: recall_potion:{tag}

Videos

Dependencies

This mod has no dependencies.

JEI is recommended for recipes but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the Modrinth launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
